title: EVENTS – hololive（ホロライブ）公式サイト

items.title: hololive English 4th Concert -Serendipity-
items.author: narita
items.content:
hololive English 4th Concert -Serendipity- Organized by: COVER Corporation

Mori Calliope / Takanashi Kiara / Ninomae Ina’nis / IRyS / Ouro Kronii / Hakos Baelz / Shiori Novella / Koseki Bijou / Nerissa Ravencroft / Fuwawa Abyssgard / Mococo Abyssgard / Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame / Gigi Murin / Cecilia Immergreen / Raora Panthera

#holoSerendipity #hololiveEN

Friday, July 3rd, 2026 (PDT)

Doors open at 6:30 PM / Streaming starts at 7:30 PM / Event starts at 8:00 PM

Saturday, July 4th, 2026 (PDT)

Doors open at 6:30 PM / Streaming starts at 7:30 PM / Event starts at 8:00 PM

Shrine Auditorium 665 W. Jefferson Blvd

・ Front ORCHESTRA & LOGE: 225 USD

・ Middle ORCHESTRA / Front BALCONY: 175 USD

・ Side ORCHESTRA & BALCONY: 150 USD

・ Rear ORCHESTRA / Middle BALCONY: 135 USD

・ Rear BALCONY 1: 110 USD

Information on venue ticket sales will be announced at a later date.

・ 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (July 3rd PDT)

・ 1-DAY Streaming Ticket (July 4th PDT)

・ 2-DAY Stream Pass

SPWN: 1 PM, April 6th, 2026 – 12 PM, August 5th, 2026 (JST)

Streaming+: 1 PM, April 8th, 2026 – 12 PM, August 5th, 2026 (JST)

* Once the performance has ended and the archive is ready, you will be able to rewatch the archived stream as much as you want until 3:59 PM, August 5th, 2026 (JST). * A service fee will be charged at the time of ticket purchase.
